title: Less Stylesheet
documentation:
## Purpose
Carries Less stylesheet files, a CSS preprocessor language that extends plain CSS with variables, nesting, mixins, functions, and arithmetic expressions. Less files are compiled to standard CSS before serving.

## When to use
Use `media:less;textable` when a pipeline node compiles or analyzes Less — for example, a build step invoking the Less compiler, or a migration tool converting a Less codebase to SCSS or native CSS custom properties.

## Notes
Less uses `@variable` syntax for variables, which conflicts with CSS at-rules. Modern projects often prefer SCSS or native CSS variables; Less remains common in older Bootstrap-based projects. See also [Less Stylesheet](https://capdag.com/browse/media:less;textable).
